title: CVE-2010-2371 — CVSS 1.9 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2010-2371

CVSS Score: 1.9 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2010-07-13T22:30:02.420
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the Oracle Transportation Management component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 6.1.1 allows local users to affect confidentiality via unknown vectors, a different vulnerability than CVE-2010-2372.

References: http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuoct2010-175626.html, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuoct2010-175626.html
